explanation: This command simulates a file download via InstallUtil.exe using a safe mutation technique by using the long-form option /url instead of direct command-line arguments. It aligns with the Sigma rule's detection of HTTP-based URLs.
This command uses substitution by replacing /url with -url, a common equivalent syntax in command-line tools. It still matches the Sigma rule's detection of HTTPS-based URLs.
This command uses insertion (quotes) and substitution (using the URL format) to simulate a benign test case. It aligns with the Sigma rule's detection of FTP-based URLs.

This command omits the explicit option indicator (like / or -) but still passes the URL parameter in a way that could be accepted by some implementations. It matches the Sigma rule's detection of HTTP-based URLs.
